Home / How We Work
Our Methodology

We build it.
We hand it over running.

We don't arrive with slides and leave you with a report. Every engagement ends with working systems, trained staff, and a business that doesn't need us in the room to function.

Take the Free Assessment

The COREX Method

Four steps.
Running in weeks.

Every engagement follows the same structure - tailored to your specific business, not copied from a playbook.

01

Assess

We spend time inside your business - in your tools, your processes, your workflows. We find exactly where time and money are being lost and quantify what it's costing you. You get a specific diagnosis, not a list of vague observations.

  • Every manual task identified and timed
  • Revenue leakage mapped to specific process gaps
  • Prioritised list of what to fix first, and why
  • Honest assessment of what's realistic in what timeframe
02

Design

We build a blueprint designed around how your business actually works. Every automation, every integration, every workflow is specific to your team, your tools, and your customers - not a template applied to your situation.

  • Custom workflow design for your specific operation
  • Tool selection based on what you already use
  • Integration architecture that doesn't require migration
  • Clear scope, timeline, and outcomes agreed upfront
03

Implement

We build it. Hands-on. Eamonn leads every engagement directly - configuring, integrating, testing, and training. We stay embedded until the systems are live, adopted, and working. This means we take on fewer clients. Every engagement gets Eamonn directly.

  • Hands-on build inside your existing tools
  • No outsourcing, no account managers
  • Parallel testing before switching off the old way
  • Team trained before we step back
04

Hand Over

We leave your team owning and running the systems - not dependent on us forever. Everything is documented, trained, and handed over in a way your team can actually use.

  • Full documentation in plain language
  • Team trained and capable before handover
  • 30-day post-launch support included
  • Systems yours to own and run

What We Build

Five systems. One operating model.

Every engagement involves one or more of these systems - built inside the tools you already use, not on top of them.

  • Automated Client Onboarding

    New client intake, document collection, project setup, and delivery briefing - automated from the moment a contract is signed. No manual steps, no information lost between sales and delivery.

  • CRM & Sales Pipeline

    Your CRM configured for how your business actually sells - with pipeline discipline, follow-up automation, renewal tracking, and forecast visibility built in from day one.

  • AI Lead Engine

    AI-assisted qualification, response, and follow-up workflows built inside your existing tools. Your team responds to warm, qualified leads - the system handles everything before that.

  • Ops Dashboard & Reporting

    A single real-time view of what's happening across your business - built inside the tools you already use. No manual report-building, ever.

  • Internal Ops & Team Systems

    The workflows, SOPs, and handoff systems your team actually follows. New hires are productive fast. Context is never lost. The founder isn't the only one who knows how things work.

4–8
Weeks to first
live system
100%

every engagement.

Systems we build. All inside
your existing tools.

We work with what you have.

Results

What it looks like
in practice.

C11 Recovery Sports Ltd

Zero systems. Just an idea. We built their entire revenue flow - lead capture → booking → payment → delivery - before volume hit. Launch-ready in weeks with zero manual booking overhead.

Launch-ready in weeks · Zero manual overhead · Built to scale

Cosy Cabins · ~$6M ARR

Founder-run, spreadsheet chaos. We designed one operating system for the entire business. Close rate hit ~29%. MRR grew to ~$500k. Founder stepped out of daily admin.

Founder freed from admin · Systems-run business · $500k MRR

Free · 12 Questions · No Obligation

build for you.
